payload.answer: The admin SQL command was not executed because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is set to false. No memory cards were accessed, modified, or returned.
payload.decision: SQL execution is disabled due to BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false, so no memory cards were retrieved or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: No SQL query executed; no entities to resolve.

details: Command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards
SQL execution blocked per security/runtime configuration.
No memory cards read, written, or altered.

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true to allow SQL execution for debugging.
Verify the environment variable is correctly configured in the Brain system.
Check system logs for confirmation of SQL disablement status.
